evals.name: trigger-munger-explicit
evals.prompt: 我想给芒格做一个像贝佐斯那样的知识库网站，把他的演讲和Poor Charlie's Almanack整理成中文知识图谱
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and start the workflow: ask user about source materials, create vault structure, plan parallel collection agents

evals.name: trigger-inamori-implicit
evals.prompt: 稻盛和夫的《活法》《干法》《心法》几本书里其实有一套完整的'敬天爱人'哲学，能不能把它整理成一个能查能溯源的中文站点？我想做成像 buffett-letters-eir 那样的
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger; should ask about copyright concerns for book content (not all chapters can be reproduced) and propose alternatives

evals.name: trigger-zhang-yiming
evals.prompt: 张一鸣这些年的内部讲话和对外采访其实有不少有意思的方法论，能帮我整理成一个知识库网站吗
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger; should ask user about which interviews/speeches they want included and propose subdomain naming

evals.name: no-trigger-summarize-only
evals.prompt: 帮我总结一下贝佐斯1997年那封著名的股东信讲了什么核心观点
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger — user just wants a summary, not building a website. Should answer directly.

evals.name: no-trigger-personal-wiki
evals.prompt: 我想把自己最近读的几本书的笔记整理成一个 Obsidian 库
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger — this is a personal note-taking project, not building a famous person's knowledge graph website
